_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). base-knowledge.md §3 records Hydration Log as a Session (Se) record type, but WP-11 only asks for a simple dietaryWater quantity mapping (not a session/correlation structure like Exercise or Food) -- this fixture is therefore shaped like the other Sample-type scalar-field fixtures (weight.json, height.json) rather than sleep.json's nested sessionPayload shape. Value key `hydration_log.liters` (field name assumed; liters chosen to match HealthKit's own dietaryWater base unit). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.hydrationPoint().
